entry.title: Welcome to the Otoroshi Blog
entry.summary: Welcome to the official Otoroshi blog! This is the place where we will share news, release announcements, tutorials, and insights about Otoroshi and the API gateway ecosystem.
entry.content:
Welcome to the official Otoroshi blog! This is the place where we will share news, release announcements, tutorials, and insights about Otoroshi and the API gateway ecosystem.

What to expect​

Here are some of the topics we plan to cover:

  • Release announcements — details about new versions, features, and improvements
  • Tutorials — step-by-step guides to help you get the most out of Otoroshi
  • Architecture deep dives — technical articles about how Otoroshi works under the hood
  • Community highlights — showcasing how the community uses Otoroshi

Stay tuned for more content, and feel free to join us on Discord to discuss any topic!
